untranslatable_reason: Signal requires peer group relative strength ranking and multi-instrument comparison (top N% of peer group, minimum peer group size, comparative momentum across instruments). These cross-instrument ranking and relative strength metrics cannot be expressed using only single-instrument indicators. price_pos_20 used as proxy for relative positioning within 20-period range, but this does not capture peer group dynamics required by the original rule.
translation_notes: Attempted proxied translation using price_pos_20 (0-1 scale) as a substitute for relative strength ranking within peer group. Entry requires price in upper (>0.80) or lower (<0.20) quintile plus price above/below SMA_20 for trend confirmation. This is a simplified approximation—true implementation requires a peer group relative strength calculation engine not available in single-instrument indicator set. The core insight (trading market leaders by identifying positioning of large players) is lost without cross-instrument comparison capability.
